title: A Long-Awaited Verdict for Marine Le Pen Could Reshape France’s Politics
summary_full: A court will decide on Tuesday whether to uphold Ms. Le Pen’s embezzlement conviction. If it does, the far-right leader will probably be barred from running for the presidency next year.
summary_public: A court will decide on Tuesday whether to uphold Ms. Le Pen’s embezzlement conviction. If it does, the far-right leader will probably be barred from running for the presidency next year.

FR.label: positive
FR.evidence: uphold Ms. Le Pen’s embezzlement conviction, barred from running
